headline: Reflecting On IT Services & Consulting Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: EPAM (NYSE:EPAM)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the it services & consulting industry, including EPAM (NYSE:EPAM) and its peers.
